name: instatus
description: Reads and manages Instatus status pages, components, incidents, maintenances, templates, subscribers, metrics, monitors, and related status-page resources through the Instatus REST API.

risk.read: external Instatus API read of status-page configuration and incident data
risk.approval: required for write actions; destructive delete actions are marked destructive
risk.write: external Instatus API mutations for status pages, incidents, maintenances, subscribers, metrics, monitors, routing rules, escalation policies, on-call schedules, and related resources
